chromium.task_canvas:
- region "Task canvas":
  - heading "Task canvas" [level=2]
  - text: SummaryStack
  - heading "Current review frame" [level=3]
  - paragraph: Which prior judgement or ownership assumption is no longer safe to carry forward?
  - text: Ownership
  - strong: SUBJ-311 · returned-evidence
  - article:
    - text: Primary summary
    - strong: Patient-reported wheeze worsened overnight after following the original advice path.
    - paragraph: Preview stays summary-first and read-only until the active task shell revalidates the decision lease.
  - article:
    - text: Summary point 2
    - strong: Returned evidence includes a new inhaler label image and a pharmacy callback note.
    - paragraph: Preview stays summary-first and read-only until the active task shell revalidates the decision lease.
  - article:
    - text: Summary point 3
    - strong: A duplicate suspicion remains open because an older repeat request reused the same phone number.
    - paragraph: Preview stays summary-first and read-only until the active task shell revalidates the decision lease.
  - text: DeltaStack
  - heading "Delta-first reopen posture" [level=3]
  - paragraph: This delta invalidates the prior path until the reviewer recommits.
  - text: Authoritative delta packet
  - strong: evidence_delta_packet::task-311::decisive
  - article:
    - text: Changed since seen
    - strong: "A decisive delta landed: the pharmacy callback and attachment pair invalidated the prior self-care judgement."
    - paragraph: "Authoritative source: evidence_delta_packet::task-311::decisive"
  - article:
    - text: Opening mode
    - strong: resumed review
    - paragraph: Resumed and approval review prioritize the delta stack before full history.
  - text: "Superseded: self-care advice variant from 09:12 assumed no controller inhaler duplication. Superseded: prior approval note treated the callback as informational, not blocking. EvidenceStack"
  - heading "Structured facts and returned evidence" [level=3]
  - paragraph: Lineage SUBJ-311 • returned-evidence
  - article:
    - text: Attachment digest
    - strong: 2 returned artifacts
    - paragraph: One inhaler photo, one pharmacy callback transcript excerpt.
  - article:
    - text: Duplicate watch
    - strong: open
    - paragraph: Lineage cluster 7 still needs reviewer acknowledgement before closure.
  - article:
    - text: Patient reply
    - strong: late but valid
    - paragraph: Reply arrived 12 minutes after the last more-info window warning.
  - text: ConsequenceStack
  - heading "Consequence preview and next-owner posture" [level=3]
  - paragraph: The active advice path must be rechecked before the case can settle.
  - text: Current preview
  - strong: Escalate to clinician callback
  - article:
    - text: Recommendation impact
    - strong: Escalate to clinician callback
    - paragraph: The active advice path must be rechecked before the case can settle.
  - article:
    - text: Support boundary
    - strong: Escalate to clinician callback
    - paragraph: If the attachment provenance fails, hand off through the bounded support stub only.
  - group:
    - text: ReferenceStack
    - strong: Collapsed by default
    - text: 3 attachment digests · review pending thread posture.
